description: Auto-update the @jeldon/* engine packages. A version bump opens a PR; it auto-merges once every CI gate (geo-floor, citation-lint, build-parity, frontmatter-guard, doctor) is green. This is the primary, hands-off channel for engine improvements — keep it on.

packageRules.description: @jeldon/* — auto-merge on green CI. The engine is the invariant; you almost never need to review these by hand.
Astro + the Cloudflare adapter move together; review by hand.
